name: Puppy's Breath Chili
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds Tri-tip beef or sirloin tip, cut into small pieces
3 tablespoons New Mexico mild chili powder
1 dried New Mexico chili pepper, boiled and pureed
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve MSG in salt to taste.
2. Brown meat in oil over medium heat for about 30 minutes.
3. Add onion and enough beef broth to cover the meat.
4. Bring to a boil and cook for 15 minutes.
5. Add 1 tablespoon cumin and 1/2 teaspoon oregano.
6. Reduce heat to a light simmer and add half of the garlic.
7. Add half of the chili powder and cook for 10 minutes.
8. Add tomato sauce, pulp from the dried peppers, and remaining garlic.
9. Add any remaining beef broth and chicken broth to reach desired consistency.
10. Cook on medium heat for one hour, stirring occasionally.
11. Add remaining chili powders and cumin.
12. Simmer on low to medium heat for 25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
13. Turn up the heat to a light boil and add Tabasco sauce, salt to taste, brown sugar, and juice of lime. Simmer on medium heat.
